experience.name: HANKYEOL Architectural Firm
experience.summary: Gained hands-on experience in model making, façade design, and CAD drafting, and investigated housing project permit processes

experience.name: Computer Vision Lab, SKKU
experience.summary:
• Built a multimodal vision-language framework combining architectural floor plans and panoramic imagery to enhance spatial reasoning and design understanding
• Integrated generative vision and layered image decomposition to simulate dynamic lighting, reflection, and spatial experience in architectural visualization
• Applied SLAM-based 3D scene abstraction and multimodal scene generation to reconstruct and interact with built environments in immersive AR/VR architectural design

experience.name: SecAI Lab, SKKU
experience.summary: Created lecture slides and programming assignments on topics such as clickjacking, CSRF, Shellshock, SQL Injection, and XSS in web security and Heartbleed in network security, for Information Security Labs (previously known as Hands-on Security)

experience.name: Learning and Adaptation Algorithms Lab, SNU
experience.summary:
• Reproduced and evaluated prompt-based adaptation frameworks (CoCoOp, ProDA, MaPLe, and PromptSRC), analyzing trade-offs between fine-tuning stability and zero-shot generalization
• Implemented and assessed advanced prompt-learning methods such as prompt distribution learning and self-regulating prompts to enhance robustness while preventing catastrophic forgetting.

education.major: Computer Science and Engineering / Architecture (Double Major)

projects.name: AI Vision System for Wireless Charging Safety (Hyundai Motor Company)
projects.summary: Developed an AI-based RGB + IR vision system for detecting foreign objects, living beings, and fire on wireless charging pads, including camera placement optimization and real-world edge inference testing.

projects.name: Education: Chemistry Basic Experiment through AR
projects.summary: Computer Science and Engineering Graduation Project. Developed an AR marker–based chemistry experiment platform with teacher evaluation features and interactive student experiment content.

projects.name: Deepfake Generation and Detection
projects.summary: Built an end-to-end deepfake pipeline by generating synthetic faces with ProGAN and DDPM/DDIM and training a CNN-based detector for cross-dataset identification.

projects.name: SKKU Restaurant
projects.summary: Implemented the frontend in Kotlin with AWS Lambda backend integration, featuring Kakao Map API-based restaurant search and review summarization using Claude API.

projects.name: Hands-on-security
projects.summary: Developed web security lab exercises by creating or modifying HTML, CSS, and JavaScript files to demonstrate real-world attacks and defenses, including implementing the Heartbleed vulnerability to analyze leaked memory and automate sensitive data extraction.

projects.name: Still-flow
projects.summary: Architecture Graduation Project. Multi-cultural platform at Suseo Station for flow and stay, proposing a new model for future transportation hubs.
